head.text: Feels constricted; heavy, hot. Eyelids heavy

stomach_abdomen.text: Painful digging from abdomen to throat, causing pain in region of heart with oppression. Colic, tympanitis. Borborygmi and diarrhœa. Swollen, painful

chest_heart.text: Constriction, extending to epigastrium. Sensation of a bar across chest. Convulsive pain in heart region with oppression. Great soreness in region of heart. Palpitation

female.text: Pain in hypogastrium, attended with slimy, whitish leucorrhœa. Weak feeling, with painful bearing down sensation at menstrual period

keynotes.text: color="#800000">HAEMATOXYLON CAMPECHIANUM Logwood (HAEMATOXYLON) Sense of constriction is characteristic. Sensation as if a bar lay across chest. Angina pectoris.
